sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
print(f"Key objects:")
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] in ['W', 'G', 'M', 'O'] and n['pixels'] <= 25:
        print(f"  color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Advance white to dark gray at ring
for i in range(10):
    magenta = None
    for n in nodes:
        if n['color'] == 'M':
            magenta = n['boundary'][0]
            break
    if not magenta:
        print(f"No magenta found")
        break
    result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': magenta[0], 'col': magenta[1]}])
    if last_action_result.get('level_completed'):
        print(f"Level completed at advance {i+1}!")
        break
    if last_action_result.get('game_over'):
        print(f"Game over at advance {i+1}")
        break
    nodes = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
    for n in nodes:
        if n['color'] == 'W' and n['pixels'] == 12:
            print(f"After advance {i+1}: white={n['boundary']}")
            break
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
